note: Shared preprocessing contract for NanoDet field detector. Python goldens AND C++ must match.
resize: stretch-to-square 416x416 (anisotropic per-axis; rectified ID-1 crop stretched to square, inverse-divide maps detections back to source space)

model.output: [1, num_anchors, 62] = [1, A, 30 cls + 4*(reg_max+1)]; A(416)=3598 (sigmoid baked into the 30 cls channels at export)
